review_title: Affordable and effective cold email outreach tool
description: I have a generally good experience with sales blink.
author: Teslim A.
pros: It's an affordable and effective cold email tool. It has most of the features need for cold email outreach, including emailwarmup.
cons: It seems their system does not remove inactive emails from the warmup pool so some warming up emails fail to deliver. I think this may affect the warmup quality.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Much less expensive than alternative software
description: SalesBlink is a less expensive alternative to other software. I have been using a different software for a year and the only thing that I did not like about that software was the price. SalesBlink purports to have the same features, so the same outcome, but more clunky to implement and not clear instructions on how to deploy. I have been Googling A LOT.
author: Andria B.
pros: I was able to bulk upload emails. It is nice that you can upload leads and verify them as a part of the process. There is a clear distinction on the report log of the recipient activity - you can see who clicked a link, who opened, and a list of those who replied. Creating a template was very easy, although the spintax to insert a signature did not work for me - I decided to paste my signature into each email instead. A signature is not automatically attached.
cons: The bulk updating for the connected sender emails was not effective. Building a campaign with logic is not intuitive like it is with others, like Snov.io. Signature attachment is not automatic.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SalesBlink - worst tool for email outreach
description: I purchase the subscription 8 months back. Initially it was working ok then suddenly all the settings got changes automatically. Tried to contact Technical team for assistance several times but no proper support is been provided. It seems they are working with 1 or 2 member hence not able to solve the queries.
author: Rahul S.
pros: There is No pros which can be mentioned here, worst email platform
cons: No Customer support, No Technical assistance. Complicated system
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: MSP using Sales Blink
description: Pretty good. You set the email campaign up and let it run. Pretty simple to view the results. I love the automation aspect and the results visuals give you a better insight.
author: Wesley S.
pros: There are a few things I really appreciate about this company. As a Principal Security Consultant, I often work late hours, and I noticed that whenever I was setting up email campaigns, the staff was always available to answer my questions—even early in the morning or late at night. Their team is very knowledgeable about the product. What stands out is that when I ask a question, I get practical, real-world answers on how to set up email campaigns, automations, or whatever task I’m working on. They guide me clearly and efficiently, so I can quickly move on to the next step—no wasting 30 minutes to an hour stuck waiting for help. Overall, their support makes a big difference in keeping my work flowing smoothly.
cons: Email automation does not seem to turn off when it hits the last person. The automation seems to stay in a state of waiting at times untill you address it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Game-Changer for My Real Estate Outreach!
description: As a realtor constantly on the lookout for quality leads, I’ve tried several cold email tools but none have come close to what SalesBlink offers. This platform has been a total game-changer for my outreach strategy. The automation features are incredibly powerful. I can create multi-step cold email sequences that feel personal, and I’ve noticed a significant increase in response rates since switching to SalesBlink. The built-in prospecting tool makes it easy to find relevant contacts, and the ability to visualize my sales outreach like a flowchart is something I didn’t even know I needed it’s super intuitive and makes managing campaigns a breeze. I also appreciate how easy it was to get started. I’m not a tech expert by any means, but SalesBlink’s interface is user-friendly, and their customer support is responsive and helpful when I’ve had questions. For anyone in real estate or any sales-driven profession who relies on outbound email, I can’t recommend SalesBlink enough. It’s helped me save time, stay organized, and most importantly, book more meetings.
author: Geoffrey L.
pros: What I liked most about SalesBlink is how it streamlines the entire cold outreach process from start to finish. As a realtor, time is everything and this tool helps me automate lead generation, email follow-ups, and outreach sequences all in one place. I especially love the visual campaign builder it lets me map out multi-step flows with ease, which is great for testing different messages and timing. The built-in prospecting tool saves me hours each week by helping me find verified email leads within my target audience. The email deliverability has also been impressive; I’ve seen more opens and replies compared to other tools I’ve used. It's efficient, intuitive, and built for results.
cons: I wish there were more interactive training videos going over how you can use and implement different strategies to different businesses.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Fits I'll need in an Email Outreach Platform
author: Josh O.
pros: 1. Ease of Implementation, navigate and useful cold email outreach and campaign solution. 2. The embedded email verification/validation solution was a life-safer for me. That alone was worth my purchase. 3. Link Warm-up: Although the email warm-up is great but I am even much more happy with the link warm-up feature. I believe this contributed a lot to improve the click-through rate on my email. 4. Blink-AI - What a great feature that has come in the handle to remove mental blocks in composing single, email sequences and follow-ups 5. Customer Support: The initial onboarding by the salesblink team was quite helpful to get me to speed. Then fast response time to issue resolution was impressive even in an outage 6. Integration: I had a quick integration of my email and third-party Calendar app like my Appsumo TidyCal was another sweet spot for me. Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
cons: Initially, it was crashing some months ago, but that was quickly rectified, and I do not remember the platform doing that anymore
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: I'm loving it so far.
description: I purchased this through AppSumo and am pleased to have a lifetime deal. Currently, I am in the process of transferring all off my outreach emails and contacts into this program.
author: Rob O.
pros: I love the dashboard layout. It is visually attractive and has all of the information laid out where I can access it. It is also a single source for my email sequences, Including warm-ups and templates and flowcharts.
cons: It has a bit of a learning curve to it. I have been using it for a couple days and I definitely don't feel like I'm proficient yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Well Worth It!
description: Using SalesBlink for personal, targeted outreach. It automates follow-ups while keeping things human and tailored.
author: Jordan M.
pros: SalesBlink saves me hours on cold outreach by automating the busywork without killing personalization.
cons: Some parts of the interface feel clunky and take a bit of trial and error to figure out or tweak properly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent Warmup Tool and easy to use Email Software
description: Easy to use and easy to add my email accounts. The instructions and help guides were very easy to understand. Overall it was a great experience.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The email warmup feature. The instructions guided me through the DNS settings and the the warmup reports is super helpful.
cons: I didn't find anything that I didn't care for. I've used several services and this was by far the best.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Promising Software
description: Great tool. Just a bit of UI uplift & better warmup recipient emails bounce management would be great
author: Sahil M.
pros: Unlimited Sending and Unlimited Leads Limits for our plan
cons: UI for Unibox can be made more like MS Outlook like other firms have. And we see more bounces during warmups versus other tools we use for warmup.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Everything together for managing outbound sales in one place
description: My team and I have tested dozens of such solutions but SalesBlink stands out for its ease of use and functionality. A must for any entrepreneur as well.
author: Jorge H.
pros: SalesBlink really pulls everything together for managing outbound sales in one place. Although we have only been using SalesBlink for a few weeks at my digital marketing agency, I have to say that it is the most comprehensive tool I have come across in recent years.
cons: This is a Startup so they improve the software everyday, it streamlines sales with useful features though it's not perfect. The AI sales sequences often require manual adjustments. I guess will become better.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SalesBlink: AI-Powered Outreach That Actually Delivers
author: Daniel V.
pros: SalesBlink has quickly become one of my favourite outreach tools. The AI-powered BlinkGPT makes writing cold emails fast and remarkably effective—it’s like having a copywriter on demand. The personalization is smart, relevant, and saves hours each week. I particularly appreciate the email warmup feature, which has helped improve my deliverability significantly. My emails are now landing in the primary inbox far more consistently than before, which is crucial for any outreach campaign. The unified inbox is another standout feature. Managing multiple email accounts and tracking replies in one place has streamlined my workflow and made follow-up much easier. Scheduling meetings is also seamless thanks to the integrated calendar feature, which syncs perfectly with both Google and Outlook. No more back-and-forth emails—just a simple link and done. Overall, SalesBlink delivers a powerful combination of automation and intelligence. If you’re looking for an all-in-one cold outreach tool with real results, this is a fantastic investment—especially at the AppSumo lifetime deal price.
cons: While using SalesBlink, I did encounter the occasional bug or glitch—nothing major, but things like small interface hiccups or features not behaving exactly as expected. That said, this is fairly common with tools undergoing active development and frequent updates. In fact, it’s often a sign that the product is evolving rapidly in response to user feedback. The team seems committed to improvement, and most issues are either resolved quickly or have viable workarounds.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Easy set up for what I need
description: Overall, it’s been a solid tool for outbound outreach. It’s not perfect, but it helps speed things up and keeps things organized. Great for small teams or solo sales folks trying to scale up outreach without needing a full tech stack.
author: Karla R.
pros: I liked how easy it was to set up campaigns and start reaching out to leads quickly. The AI email writing assistant is super handy when you're short on time or ideas. Also, being able to automate follow-ups saved me a ton of manual work.
cons: The interface can feel a bit clunky in some places, especially when trying to organize multiple campaigns. Also, the email warm-up feature seemed a little unpredictable at times.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Essential and Flexible Sales Outreach Solution
description: My experience with SalesBlink has been outstanding since the first moment I discovered it during AppSumo's lifetime deal. It’s my go-to solution, combining essential robust features with the flexibility needed to incorporate advanced strategies seamlessly. It truly supports my work as an email deliverability professional perfectly.
author: Kaitlyn M.
pros: What I like most about SalesBlink is its excellent flexibility. It allows me to effortlessly implement my unique email deliverability strategies, which is vital for my cold sales email deliverability consultancy, Inbox Impact Co.
cons: I haven't encountered any significant drawbacks so far. The platform meets all of my current needs effectively.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Feature-Rich sales outreach platform
description: Salesblink is engineered with a robust suite of functionalities that support systematic sales outreach. Its design focuses on automating campaigns, managing lead data efficiently, and tracking performance through detailed analytics.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Sequence Designer: great, we can customize every step of a flow Lead and contact management: all is well organised Warmup function: customizable and automatic
cons: The template section could be richer but the tool is updated daily
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: A robust, legitimate, and cost-effective software solution.
description: I have established an online training school for leisure activities, but I lacked the resources to invest in an expensive software. However, I discovered SalesBlink, and with a modest investment, I was able to send emails to all Italian schools.
author: mario B.
pros: Simple and clear, it performs its function with remarkable efficiency. Furthermore, it offers an excellent quality-to-price ratio.
cons: It is necessary to configure the DNS, which requires a certain level of expertise; however, this is a common requirement with all software of this nature.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great rising cold email outreach tool, highly suggested
description: Started running a few campaigns I'm getting a good opening rate and also very good deliverability
author: Lorenzo G.
pros: It's very easy to set up, run and good deliverability
cons: Interface could get an uplift but gets the job done.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use and does what it says
description: Easy to use and does what it says. The workflows are simple but can be adapted if/when needed. The GenAI is surprisingly eloquent.
author: Maarten L.
pros: It is simple in use and administration. Intuitive and gets the job done. GenAI is used intelligently.
cons: It is limited to what it does, i.e. you need to integrate it with other tools to integrate the full sales cycle
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Solid Tool; Great UI; Built in calendar; Good Personalization
description: SalesBlink is a solid part of my toolkit that I plan to use more in 2025. Excited to see how this product evolves.
author: Denny B.
pros: Seems like a very solid product with a great UI and excellent personalization along with a built-in calendar.
cons: I haven't used it much for sending out any cold emails other than tests although I plan to use it for email personalizations in 2025.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Quite easy to automate your cold email outreach
description: So far I automated around 10 sales for my saas
author: Wouter V.
pros: It helps me automate my cold sales outreach
cons: Had to get myself used to using it but it is wuite straight forward.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Honest review.
author: Andres D.
pros: Good tool for outbound marketing. Need to test it out more.
cons: They keep changing their pricing. Limiting ltds
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Email warm up works well
description: It is a good system for email warm up and haven't used other features yet
author: Mark C.
pros: The email warm up works well for new email addresses
cons: The navigation could be better to help find settings etc
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Powerful Cold Email Outreach Tool with Room for Growth
author: Alexandru B.
pros: One of the standout features of SalesBlink is the email rotator function. It allows you to automatically send a campaign from multiple email addresses, which is a game-changer for those looking to scale their outreach efforts. Additionally, the ability to warm up multiple tools simultaneously is a huge time-saver. I'm consistently impressed by how active the SalesBlink team is in releasing improvements and updates. It's clear that they're committed to making their product the best it can be, and that gives me confidence in the tool's future. Another feature I appreciate is the unified inbox, which streamlines my workflow and makes it easy to manage all of my outreach in one place.
cons: While SalesBlink is already a powerful tool, there are a couple of areas where I'd like to see improvements. The ability to accept webhooks would be a great addition, as it would allow for even more automation. I'd also like to see the warm-up reports updated in real-time for more accurate tracking.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Awesome Sales Engagement Platform
author: Sai M.
pros: I am highly impressed with their new UI, which offers a much smoother experience compared to the previous version. The BlinkGPT AI-assisted personalized email responses for each lead are fantastic and have significantly improved our outreach. I appreciate that it's a comprehensive 360-degree solution for cold email outreach, including essential features like email warmup and scheduling. [sensitive content hidden] has been incredibly helpful, always ready to assist with any questions or concerns.
cons: Nothing that i dislike. One particular feature i would like to see is Linkedin automation so i can create linkedin+email automation sequences
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Must Have for Email marketing
description: I would say. As a first time email marketer who is confused which email marketing tool to use this tool was a gamechanger as it helped me cut down costs. multitask of calendly. The ui experience is better then manyreach. i would highly recommend it
author: Shivathmaj S.
pros: I liked the Ai integration which autogenerates email. Helps in booking call with a calendly kind of integration. their support is also good in case you face issue
cons: sometime there is some down time but they will fix it
